message.content:
Explore the post card components in the iskrib_v3 project. I need to understand:

1. The current post card layout and components - look in `client/src/components/HomePage/postCards/` directory
2. How canvas posts are currently rendered in the feed - what component wraps CanvasPreview?
3. The CSS files for post cards - especially any card container styling
4. How the post header (avatar, username, timestamp) is rendered
5. How the post footer (reactions, buttons) is rendered
6. Any existing "Remix" button functionality
7. The current CanvasPreview CSS at `client/src/components/HomePage/postCards/CanvasPreview/canvaspreview.css`

Be thorough - check all files in the postCards directory and related components. I need to understand the full card layout structure including parent components that render these cards.

content.text: I'll conduct a thorough exploration of the post card components in the iskrib_v3 project. Let me start by identifying all files in the postCards directory and examining the structure.

input.description: List all JSX, JS, and CSS files in HomePage directory

content.text: Good! I can see the structure. Now let me read all the key files to understand the post card layout comprehensively.
Now let me read the ProfilePostCards CSS to understand the full styling:

input.description: List all files in postCards directory

content.text: Now let me read the remaining helper files to get a complete picture:
Perfect! Now let me check for any parent components that wrap these cards and look at additional context:

input.description: Find where PostCards components are imported/used

content.text: Let me check the VisitedProfilePostCards component as well:

Perfect! I now have a comprehensive understanding of the post card components. Let me provide you with a detailed exploration report. --- ## Post Card Components Exploration Report ### 1. File Structure & Overview The post card system is located in `C:/Users/johnm/iskrib_v3/client/src/components/HomePage/postCards/` and consists of: **Main Components:** - `PostCards.jsx` - Feed view with infinite scroll (READS in frontend/public posts) - `ProfilePostCards.jsx` - User's own posts (grid/list view toggle) - `VisitedProfilePostCards.jsx` - Viewing another user's public posts - `CanvasPreview/CanvasPreview.jsx` - Canvas artwork preview renderer - **Helper Functions:** - `parseData.js` - Extracts text/images from Lexical JSON content - `calculateReadingTime.js` - Calculates reading time (150 words/min avg) --- ### 2. Current Post Card Layout Structure #### **A. Main Card Container (`.cards`)** Located in `postcards.css` (lines 289-308): ``` .cards { display: flex flex-direction: column width: 99%, max-width: 100% background: var(--bg-card) border: 1px solid var(--border-card) border-radius: 12px cursor: pointer transition: box-shadow, transform } ``` **Hover Effect:** Shadow elevation + 2px upward translate #### **B. Card Content Sections (from top to bottom)** 1. **Canvas Preview Section** (if `post_type === 'canvas'`) - Component: `` - Max height: 220px desktop, 160px mobile - Aspect ratio: 1:1 or 4:5 (configurable via canvas metadata) - Theme-aware: light (#FAFAFA) or dark (#1A1A1A) background 2. **Banner Image** (for text posts) - Class: `.card-image-banner` - Max height: 220px - Object-fit: cover - Border-bottom: 1px separator 3. **Card Content Area** (`.card-content`) - Padding: 1rem 1.15rem 0.6rem 1.15rem - Gap: 0.8rem between elements - Contains: - **Canvas Type Badge** (if canvas post): ```jsx Canvas ``` Styling: Sage green accent color, rounded pill - **Post Title** (`.feed-title`) - Font: Lexend Deca, 1.1rem, 700 weight - Truncated: 55 chars + "..." - **Preview Text** (`.feed-text-content`) - Font: Serif, 0.88rem, 400 weight - Max: 215 chars + "..." 4. **Canvas Action Buttons** (if canvas post) - Class: `.canvas-card-actions` - **Remix Button**: ```jsx ``` - Styling: Purple/sage accent, pill-shaped (999px border-radius) - Padding: 0.3rem 0.65rem - Font: 0.68rem, 620 weight --- ### 3. Post Footer: User Info & Reactions #### **Post Header/Footer Container** (`.card-icons-container`) Location: `postcards.css` lines 597-641 ``` .card-icons-container { display: flex flex-wrap: wrap width: 100% padding: 0.5rem 1.15rem 0.85rem 1.15rem min-height: 22px border-top: 1px solid var(--border-card) gap: 0.5rem } ``` #### **A. User Info Section** (`.user-info-child-container`) - **Avatar** (`.user-info-avatar`): 22px × 22px, circular - Badge rings for "legend" (gold #FFD700) and "og" (purple #9B59FF) users - Glow animations with keyframes - **Username** (`.user-newsfeed-name`): 0.78rem, 600 weight - Hover: underline + sage accent color - **Verified Badge**: `` - **Separator**: "•" dot - **Posted Date** (`.user-post-date`): Formatted timestamp #### **B. Reaction Buttons** (Icon container) Four action buttons configured in `cardIcons` array: 1. **Like Button** (`.like-button`) - SVG: Heart icon (2-path fill strategy) - Color when liked: `rgb(255, 116, 116)` (red) - Hover bg: `rgba(255, 161, 161, 0.12)` - Count: Formatted via `formatCounts()` 2. **Comment Button** (`.comment-button`) - SVG: Chat bubble - Color hover: `var(--accent-amber)` (#D4A853) - Action: Opens content detail view via `viewContent()` 3. **Bookmark Button** (`.bookmark-button`) - SVG: Bookmark icon - Color when bookmarked: `rgb(72, 208, 135)` (sage green) - Action: Debounced `handleClickBookmark()` with 2.5s toast message 4. **View Count** (`.icon-container #card-icons-view`) - SVG: Eye icon - Non-interactive display of `journal?.views` #### **C. Reading Time Pill** (`.reading-time-container`) - Margin-left: auto (pushed right) - Styling: Pill shape (10px border-radius) - Format: "X min(s) read" - Font: 0.62rem, 550 weight, sage accent color #### **D. Settings Menu** (`.user-post-settings`) - Three-dot menu icon (SVG) - Opens `.setting-modal` on click (currently minimal implementation) --- ### 4. How Canvas Posts Are Rendered in the Feed **In PostCards.jsx (lines 521-592):** ```jsx const isCanvasPost = journal?.post_type === 'canvas'; return ( {isCanvasPost && ( )}
{isCanvasPost && (
)}
); ``` **Key Differences for Canvas Posts:** - Card class: `is-canvas-card` modifier - Top accent bar: 3px green-to-amber gradient (lines 104-120 in canvaspreview.css) - Background: Light (#F9F8F4) or dark (rgb(26, 26, 23)) depending on theme - Border: Sage-tinted (30% opacity mix) - No banner image (thumbnail = null) - Canvas preview replaces image section - Remix button displayed in content area - Click handler: `handleExpandCanvas()` navigates to full detail view --- ### 5. Canvas Preview Component Details **File:** `C:/Users/johnm/iskrib_v3/client/src/components/HomePage/postCards/CanvasPreview/CanvasPreview.jsx` **Props:** `canvasDoc` (parsed canvas JSON from database) **Rendering Logic:** 1. Parses `canvasDoc` via `parseCanvasDoc()` utility 2. Lazy loads via IntersectionObserver (rootMargin: 320px) 3. Responsive sizing: ResizeObserver watches container 4. Renders `` component with: - Viewport dimensions (responsive to container) - Stage dimensions: 560px base width, height calculated by aspect ratio - Fit scale calculation for centering - Grid dots overlay (opacity 0.35) - Doodles, images, text snippets from canvas data **CSS Styling** (`canvaspreview.css`): - Max height: 220px (desktop), 160px (mobile) - Aspect ratios: 1:1 or 4:5 - Grid dots pattern: 16×16px spacing - Loading state: "Loading canvas..." text - Empty state: "Canvas" text (centered) --- ### 6. Remix Button Functionality **Handler:** `handleRemixCanvas()` in PostCards.jsx (lines 106-130) ```jsx const handleRemixCanvas = (e, journal) => { e.stopPropagation(); // Auth check if(!session) { openAuthModal(); return; } // Generate remix title (prepend "Remix: " if not already) const sourceTitle = journal?.title?.trim() || ''; const remixTitle = sourceTitle.toLowerCase().startsWith('remix:') ? sourceTitle : `Remix: ${sourceTitle || 'Canvas'}`; // Navigate to editor with canvas pre-loaded navigate('/home', { state: { openEditor: true, editorMode: 'canvas', initialTitle: remixTitle, initialCanvasDoc: journal?.canvas_doc || null, remixSource: { journalId: journal?.id, authorName: journal?.users?.name || 'Unknown' } } }); }; ``` **Styling:** (postcards.css lines 574-594) - Button: `.canvas-card-action-btn.is-remix` - Border color: Purple-tinted (42% opacity of accent-purple) - Text color: `var(--accent-purple)` - Hover: Sage accent override --- ### 7. Profile Post Cards Layout (Grid & List Views) **Grid View** (profilepostcards.css lines 85-170): - 3-column layout on desktop, 2-column on mobile - Image aspect ratio: 4:3 - Minimal text display (2-line title, 2-line snippet) - Footer: privacy icon + settings menu **List View** (profilepostcards.css lines 212-323): - Full-width cards (similar to feed) - Canvas preview supported - Author info + engagement data - Matches main feed card styling --- ### 8. CSS Files Summary | File | Purpose | Key Classes | |------|---------|-------------| | `postcards.css` | Main feed card styling | `.cards`, `.card-content`, `.card-icons-container`, `.canvas-type-badge`, `.canvas-card-actions` | | `canvaspreview.css` | Canvas preview theming | `.canvas-preview`, `.canvas-preview-dots`, `.canvas-preview-stage`, `.is-canvas-card` | | `profilepostcards.css` | Profile view cards | `.profile-postcards`, `.postcards-grid-view`, `.postcards-list-view`, `.post-settings-container` | --- ### 9. Data Flow 1. **PostCards Component:** - Fetches journals via `useInfiniteQuery` (React Query) - Detects post type: `journal?.post_type === 'canvas'` - Extracts content via `ParseContent()` or `getCanvasPreview()` - Renders appropriate preview (image banner or canvas) 2. **User Interactions:** - Like: `useLikeMutation()` with real-time update - Bookmark: `useBookMarkMutation()` with 2.5s toast - Comment: `viewContent()` navigates to detail view - Remix: `handleRemixCanvas()` opens editor with pre-filled data - Views: `useAddViewsMutation()` increments view count 3. **State Management:** - Auth: Context via `useAuth()` - Queries: React Query caching + infinite scroll pagination - UI: Local state for modals, search, view toggle --- ### 10. Key Component Relationships ``` PostCards (main feed) ├── CanvasPreview (renders canvas artwork) └── card-icons-container (footer) ├── user-info-child-container (avatar + name) └── action buttons (like, comment, bookmark, view count) ProfilePostCards ├── Grid View │ └── postcards-grid-item (3-column) │ ├── CanvasPreview or Image │ └── postcards-grid-body └── List View └── profile-postcards (full-width) ├── CanvasPreview or Image └── card-icons-container (same as feed) ``` --- ## Summary The post card system is a well-structured, dual-view design supporting both traditional text/image posts and interactive Canvas artwork. The Remix functionality allows users to copy and modify canvas creations, with the button styled distinctly in purple/sage accent colors and positioned in the canvas-specific action bar. The layout is responsive with mobile-specific optimizations and uses Framer Motion for smooth animations throughout.
